_openclawExport.purpose: Stage guarded private YouTube publish workflow as an inactive separate path from preflight-only package validation
_openclawExport.workflowName: AGE17 Dev - YouTube Private Publish v1

notes: records thumbnail set/failed status in publish ledger

name: AGE17 Dev - YouTube Private Publish v1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: $json.ok, status: $json.status, route: $json.route, requestId: $json.requestId, publishApproved: $json.publishApproved, uploadEnabled: $json.uploadEnabled, readyForUpload: $json.readyForUpload, duplicate: $json.duplicate, duplicateRecord: $json.duplicateRecord, ledgerAvailable: $json.ledgerAvailable, gateBlocks: $json.gateBlocks, missing: $json.missing, validationErrors: $json.validationErrors, uploadPlan: $json.uploadPlan, thumbnailPlan: $json.thumbnailPlan, rollbackPlan: $json.rollbackPlan, message: $json.message }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ 'https://www.googleapis.com/upload/youtube/v3/thumbnails/set?videoId=' + ($('Upload Private Video to YouTube').first().json.id || $('Upload Private Video to YouTube').first().json.videoId || $('Upload Private Video to YouTube').first().json.uploadId || ($('Upload Private Video to YouTube').first().json.uploadResult && $('Upload Private Video to YouTube').first().json.uploadResult.id) || '') + '&uploadType=media' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ledger = $('Record Private Publish Ledger').first().json; const thumbnail = $json || {}; const thumbnailError = thumbnail.error || thumbnail.message || null; const thumbnailSet = !thumbnailError; try { const workflowStatic = $getWorkflowStaticData('global'); const key = ledger.ledgerKey; const existingLedger = workflowStatic && workflowStatic.youtubePublishLedger ? workflowStatic.youtubePublishLedger : null; if (existingLedger && existingLedger[key]) { existingLedger[key].thumbnailStatus = thumbnailSet ? 'set' : 'failed'; existingLedger[key].thumbnailUpdatedAt = new Date().toISOString(); if (thumbnailError) existingLedger[key].thumbnailError = thumbnailError; } } catch (error) {} return { ok: true, status: thumbnailSet ? 'private_publish_recorded_thumbnail_set' : 'private_publish_recorded_thumbnail_failed', requestId: $('Validate Private Publish Gate').first().json.requestId, videoId: ledger.videoId, ledgerRecorded: ledger.ledgerRecorded, ledgerKey: ledger.ledgerKey, uploadPlan: ledger.uploadPlan, youtubeUpload: ledger.youtubeUpload, thumbnailAttempted: true, thumbnailSet, thumbnailError }; })() }}
